products.name: Tone Touch 03
products.description: The TONE Touch 03 is a 100% boilerless single-serve brewer that unleashes the full potential of coffee and tea at the touch of a button. The intelligent recipe development system enables complete customization of beverages including adjustable flow rates, pulse patterns, and temperature — covering blooming, turbulence, and development phases. Achieves 94°C within 2 seconds of powering on. Programmable for batches from 200 ml up to 1.5 L. Can memorize up to 60 recipes for coffee and tea creations. Ability to adjust recipes remotely via the TONE Beverage Manager app (iOS, Android, Windows). Winner of the SCA Best New Product Award 2021.

products.name: Tone Touch 04

specs.cold_brew_time: Cold filter coffee ready in 35 minutes
specs.recipes: Unlimited via TONE Beverage Manager software
specs.features: Basket detection & locking system, condensation backflow directed into brew basket, dishwasher-safe brew basket carrier, bypass functionality for concentrate dilution, iced coffee brewing

products.description: The TONE Touch 04 features enhanced brew capacity and control with advanced 100% Boilerless Technology. Baristas can precisely adjust settings for optimal results, while the TONE Beverage Manager software allows for unlimited recipe creation and sharing. With 4 programmable recipe buttons, versatile customization is at your fingertips. Basket detection and locking system ensure safety during the brewing process. Cold filter coffee is ready in 35 minutes. Optimized bypass functionality allows for concentrate dilution. Supports iced coffee brewing directly into an ice kit. Nominated for SCA Best New Product at World of Coffee Copenhagen 2024.
